channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass and bush looks awful, 6th May
item.description:
Buttercup farm Tewkesbury road Norton

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A38, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 6th May
item.description:
